summary.lv: AGCSOFT, Rīgas IT izstrādes uzņēmums, kas veido mobilās lietotnes, mājaslapas un individuālus IT risinājumus, meklē DevOps inženieri savai komandai — augsta atalgojuma loma ar hibrīda darbu.
summary.en: AGCSOFT — a Riga-based IT development company building mobile apps, websites and custom IT solutions — is hiring a DevOps Engineer for its team: a high-paying hybrid role.
